# Dately — AI-Powered Surprise Date Planner

> Dately is an iOS app that creates AI-powered surprise date plans with real local venues. Users set their mood, budget, and time, then scratch to reveal a personalized date itinerary.

## What is Dately?

Dately is a mobile app for couples and singles that generates surprise date plans using artificial intelligence. The app combines AI (Claude by Anthropic) with real venue data from Google Places, Ticketmaster, and local event APIs to create actionable date itineraries.

## Key Features

- **Scratch-to-Reveal**: Date plans are hidden behind interactive scratch cards for a surprise element
- **AI-Powered Plans**: Personalized itineraries generated by Claude AI using real venue data
- **Real Venues & Events**: All suggestions come from Google Places, Ticketmaster, and local event data — never made-up
- **Date Scrapbook**: Save photos, notes, and ratings from every date
- **Works for Everyone**: Designed for couples, singles, and friend groups
- **Any City**: Works globally using location-based venue and event discovery

## How It Works

1. **Choose Your Vibe** — Pick a mood (adventurous, cozy, romantic, spontaneous), set your budget and time
2. **Scratch to Reveal** — AI generates a surprise date plan with real local venues; scratch the card to reveal each activity
3. **Go on Your Date** — Follow the itinerary with real directions, save memories to your scrapbook

## Pricing

- Free tier: Limited date plans per month
- Premium: Unlimited dates, advanced customization, and exclusive date packs

## Availability

- Platform: iOS (iPhone and iPad)
- Launch: 2026
- Available in: Any city worldwide
